description: Style note Low-cut styling on the classic suede shoe, this pair from woodland is set to become your mainstay while braving the great outdoors. Aggressive outsole with lugs, D-ring eyelets and tough overlays make this an adventurer's sartorial dream. Wear these with your cargo shorts or military pants and your favourite polo t-shirt. Upper Leather upper with strategically placed overlays Five-hole lace ups with D-ring metal eyelets Padded tongue Pull loop at the heel Padded insole for in-step comfort Removable sockliner to accommodate an orthotic Outsole reinforced onto the upper at the heel Midsole Rubber midsole Outsole Dual density TPU outsole with geometric lugs for grip and traction, a curved midfoot and a raised heel Outsole reinforced onto the upper on the toe box and heel collar for maximum comfort Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Use a suede brush to remove dust from suede parts Do not machine wash
